dungeon.name: Cultist Conclave
dungeon.notes: A robed leader directs fanatic followers.

dungeon.name: Goblin Raiders
dungeon.notes: A noisy mob of scavengers swarms the room.

dungeon.name: Aberrant Horror
dungeon.notes: Something deeply wrong dwells in the dark.

dungeon.name: Undead Horde
dungeon.notes: The dead rise in numbers from ancient graves.

dungeon.name: Fiend and Thralls
dungeon.notes: A bound devil commands its corrupted servants.

dungeon.name: Humanoid Assassins
dungeon.notes: A cell of killers moves through the shadows.

dungeon.name: Ooze Colony
dungeon.notes: Acidic masses pool in a flooded chamber.

dungeon.name: Undead Overlord
dungeon.notes: A powerful undead commands its lesser kin.

wilderness.name: Wolf Pack
wilderness.notes: Predators hunt as a coordinated group.

wilderness.name: Bandit Patrol
wilderness.notes: Armed road agents look for easy prey.

wilderness.name: Apex Predator
wilderness.notes: A lone monster claims this territory.

wilderness.name: Bandit Warband
wilderness.notes: A captain leads a raiding party.

wilderness.name: Fey Wanderers
wilderness.notes: Capricious spirits from a nearby crossing.

wilderness.name: Giant and Servants
wilderness.notes: A hulking giant moves with a retinue.

wilderness.name: Raider Warband
wilderness.notes: A large war party moves through the region.

urban.name: Thieves Guild
urban.notes: A crime boss and enforcers operate in the district.

urban.name: Undead Haunting
urban.notes: The restless dead plague a building or alley.

urban.name: Assassin Cell
urban.notes: A contract killer and handlers move to eliminate a target.

urban.name: Cultist Gathering
urban.notes: A dark cult assembles in secret.

urban.name: Fiend Corruption
urban.notes: A devil or demon operates through proxies or appears directly.

urban.name: Vigilante Hunters
urban.notes: Self-appointed protectors take the law into their own hands.

urban.name: Construct Uprising
urban.notes: Magical constructs have broken their binding.

forest.name: Bandit Camp
forest.notes: Outlaws ambush from the tree line.

forest.name: Awakened Plants
forest.notes: The forest itself moves against intruders.

forest.name: Apex Predator
forest.notes: One massive creature rules this stretch of forest.

forest.name: Pixie Court
forest.notes: Dozens of small fey swarm with mischief.

forest.name: Treant Grove
forest.notes: An ancient tree and its awakened kin.

forest.name: Beast Stampede
forest.notes: A panicked herd of dangerous creatures.

forest.name: Dragon in the Wood
forest.notes: A wyrm nests nearby and claims this wood.

swamp.name: Risen Dead
swamp.notes: Bog zombies and drowned dead emerge from murky water.

swamp.name: Swamp Predator
swamp.notes: A massive reptile or amphibian ambushes from water.

swamp.name: Tribal Raid
swamp.notes: A marsh tribe defends its territory.

swamp.name: Plant Guardians
swamp.notes: Carnivorous flora animates to trap prey.

swamp.name: Aberrant Dweller
swamp.notes: Something deeply wrong lives in the depths.

swamp.name: Ooze Colony
swamp.notes: Bubbling masses of acidic slime in stagnant pools.

swamp.name: Bog Undead
swamp.notes: Preserved dead from ancient battles walk again.

swamp.name: Fey Swamp Court
swamp.notes: A dark fey lord with bound servants.

swamp.name: Fiend Corruption
swamp.notes: A lower planar entity seeps through a weak point in reality.

mountain.name: Cliff Predator
mountain.notes: A powerful creature owns this stretch of mountain.

mountain.name: Mountain Raiders

mountain.name: Giant Clan
mountain.notes: A full raiding party of giants descends.

mountain.name: Beast Pack
mountain.notes: Predators driven down from higher altitudes by hunger.

mountain.name: Air Elementals
mountain.notes: Wind elementals rage at high altitude.

mountain.name: Mountain Scouts
mountain.notes: Dwarven or ranger patrols protecting the passes.

mountain.name: Giant Warlord
mountain.notes: A chieftain leads elite giant warriors.

mountain.name: Stone Guardian
mountain.notes: An ancient magical sentinel of the peaks.

desert.name: Cursed Dead
desert.notes: Preserved mummies and skeletal warriors from buried ruins.

desert.name: Sand Predator
desert.notes: A massive creature perfectly adapted to the heat.

desert.name: Raider War Party
desert.notes: Nomadic raiders strike fast and retreat into the dunes.

desert.name: Sand Elementals
desert.notes: Sandstorm elementals coalesce from a sudden squall.

desert.name: Desert Giant
desert.notes: A solitary giant claiming the wasteland.

desert.name: Nomad War Party
desert.notes: A tribal chief leads mounted warriors.

desert.name: Buried Legion
desert.notes: An army entombed centuries ago stirs from the sand.

desert.name: Fiend Manifestation
desert.notes: A devil or demon drawn to suffering in the wastes.

desert.name: Desert Tyrant

arctic.name: Ice Elementals

arctic.name: Frost Raiders

arctic.name: Frozen Dead

arctic.name: Frost Giant Clan
arctic.notes: A jarl leads ice giant warriors.

arctic.name: Arctic Predator

arctic.name: Blizzard Elemental

arctic.name: Survivalist Patrol

arctic.name: Frost Wyrm

arctic.name: Ancient Guardian
arctic.notes: A mechanical sentinel preserved in permafrost.

underwater.name: Abyssal Horror

underwater.name: Abyssal Fiend
